testResults.details: Function responds with proper JSON structure including message, timestamp, requestId, and metadata
Function correctly processes and includes name parameter in response message
Function properly sanitizes input by removing dangerous HTML tags
Function correctly returns 405 status for unsupported HTTP methods
Function properly handles POST requests with 200 status response
All required security headers present: Content-Type, CORS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options
Function properly truncates input to 100 characters preventing buffer overflow

notes: Error handling is comprehensive and secure
Input validation prevents common attack vectors
Response structure is consistent and well-formatted
